description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern, minimalist design, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or communal outdoor spaces. The main seating area is upholstered in a textured gray fabric, while a prominent corner section features a smooth, black surface that may serve as an ottoman or chaise. The lounge has three main seating segments, each with attached backrests and low-profile armrests at the ends, providing ample seating for multiple people. The legs are thin, black, and metal, slightly elevating the lounge above the ground for a light, airy appearance. The cushions are thick and plush, with a uniform, non-tufted finish, and the overall silhouette is clean and geometric. The combination of materials and colors gives the lounge a contemporary, versatile look that fits well in both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional lounge with gray fabric upholstery, a black corner ottoman or chaise, and slim black metal legs. Features thick, attached cushions and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, gray seating, and the black corner section prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the black corner section and the short armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long backrest and the full length of the gray seating area.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the shorter segment and the transition between the gray and black sections.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached; a single, smooth black ottoman/chaise section integrated at the corner.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a uniform, rectangular profile and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Low-profile, straight armrests at the ends of the sectional; absent at the corner and inner sides.
attribute_leg_style: Thin, straight, black metal legs, evenly spaced, with a minimalist, modern appearance and moderate height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric on the main seating and backrest areas; smooth, solid black surface on the ottoman/chaise section; no visible patterns or tufting.
